'''House Garonnin''' was one of the aristocratic [[Ancient Houses]] in the [[Senex sector/Legends|Senex sector]] that allied itself with [[Roganda Ismaren/Legends|Roganda]] and [[Irek Ismaren]] in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]. They made profits through strip-mining [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] under non-worker-friendly conditions. It was led by [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Garonnin]].

{{Stub}}
